products.name: MIRA X HOTAS
products.descriptor: Portable HOTAS ground control station with 19" HD widescreen

evidence.snippet: MIRA X HOTAS (GCS) – Desert Rotor

**Hands On Throttle And Stick (HOTAS) Layout:** MIRA X’s HOTAS layout offers intuitive, hands-on control for quick access to essential functions. This ergonomic design enhances responsiveness, giving operators the precision needed for efficient mission management.
![](https://desertrotor.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Made_In_USA_Tag.png "Made_In_USA_Tag")

products.notes: Made in USA badge on product page; no explicit NDAA claim.

products.name: GCS Field Stand
products.descriptor: Collapsible rugged field stand custom-designed for MIRA X

evidence.snippet: – COLLAPSIBLE RUGGED FIELD STAND –
Sturdy, light, and tough, our custom fully collapsible field stand is custom designed for MIRA X for heavy duty quick deployment in the most remote and rugged locations.

products.notes: Available in Desert Gold and Midnight Black.

products.name: Standard 6,600 mAh Li-Ion Battery
products.descriptor: 14.8 V 6.6 Ah Li-Ion GCS battery pack, ~2–3 hr runtime

evidence.snippet: Standard 6,600 mAh Li-Ion Battery

Our standard GCS Battery. Estimated 2-3 hour runtime depending on GCS configuration / radios.
*   **Battery**: Li-ion Battery: 14.8V 6.6Ah (97.68Wh, 6A rate)
*   **Voltage**: 14.8V (working) 16.8V ( peak) 11.0V ( cut-off)
*   **Capacity**: 6600 mAh min. (97.68 wh)

products.name: Enhanced 10,500 mAh Li-Ion Battery
products.descriptor: 14.8 V 10.5 Ah Li-Ion GCS battery pack for extended runtime

evidence.snippet:
Enhanced 10,500 mAh Li-Ion Battery
* * *
For further increased GCS runtimes, larger 10.5 Ah Li-Ion battery packs can be purchased. These packs are the same size as our 6.6 Ah packs and will fit the existing battery mounts.
*   **Battery**: Li-ion Battery: 14.8V 10.5 Ah (151.2 Wh, 10A rate)

products.name: BKPK Modular Batteries
products.descriptor: IP67 MIL-STD-810H modular ~8 kWh battery system for GCS field ops

evidence.snippet: BKPK delivers a resilient, composable energy platform purpose-built for the evolving demands of modern data centers, utilities and critical infrastructure.

BKPK modular batteries can be used for mobile power on Desert Rotor ground control stations, enabling longer runtime and field operations in remote or power-constrained environments than traditional batteries.

*   **Energy storage:** ~8 kWh total capacity (modular battery packs)
*   **Max power output:** ~14-15 kW peak delivery
*   **Maximum current:** Up to ~60 A output
*   **Cycle life:** Designed for ~4,000 cycles (~10+ years)
*   **Ruggedness:** IP67 rated and built to **MIL-STD-810H** for waterproof and drop-proof performance

products.notes: Third-party product (BKPK brand) resold/integrated by Desert Rotor; listed as selectable battery option in GCS configurator.

products.name: Tenergy T320 Portable Power Station
products.descriptor: 300 Wh portable power bank for extended MIRA X operation

evidence.snippet: Tenergy T320 Portable Power Station (10,250mAh Battery)

To achieve significantly longer GCS run times the Tenergy T320 Power Bank can be used to power MIRA X. The increased 10,250mAh will power MIRA X for an estimated 3-5 hours depending on GCS configuration.

products.notes: Third-party product (Tenergy brand) sold as GCS power accessory.

products.name: Tenergy T600 Portable Power Station
products.descriptor: 600 Wh LiFePO4 portable power bank for long-duration GCS operation

evidence.snippet: Tenergy T600 Portable Power Station (40,500mAh Battery)

To achieve significantly longer GCS run times the Tenergy T600 Power Bank can be used to power MIRA X. The increased 40,500mAh will power MIRA X for an estimated 6-9 hours depending on GCS configuration.

products.notes: Third-party product (Tenergy brand) sold as GCS power accessory.

unresolved_questions: NDAA Section 848/889 compliance not addressed anywhere on the site for any product; only a Made-in-USA badge appears on the three GCS product pages.
Blue UAS cleared list status not mentioned for any product.

Communication links listed on /product/communicationlinks/ (RFD900x, Silvus StreamCaster, Persistent Systems MPU5, DTC BluSDR-6/30, Mobilicom SkyHopper/MCU-30, Doodle Labs, TBS Crossfire, Dragon Link, Triad THPR1006, etc.) appear to be third-party integration options without Desert Rotor SKUs; omitted.
Antenna products (Airborne Innovations R10/R40 tracking antenna, Optimum Solutions OS-PT series, 2.4 GHz Pepperbox, 2.4 GHz RHCP) are third-party items on the antenna page; omitted.
GCS Power Supply and Li-Ion EZ-Charger are bundled accessories, not separately purchasable SKUs; omitted.
93 skipped/failed crawl pages appear to be blog/about/support/shop-pagination; no additional named products expected.
